title: Architecture: Environment & URL Alignment
description: The portal shows 'development' and points 'production' to localhost. This is an architectural configuration failure. SRE/Architect must: 1. Update BettingApp/.env to APP_ENV=production. 2. Update config URLs to use bestfam.us instead of localhost. 3. Ensure UI changes are visible by forcing a fresh dev build. 4. Proof: Verify /api/config returns production URLs.
